page_metadata.biotools__summary:
SOMDE: A scalable method for identifying spa-tially variable genes with self-organizing map. A scalable method for identifying spatially variable genes with self-organizing map.

Algorithm for finding gene spatial pattern based on Gaussian process accelerated by SOM.
